summary: A Go-based modular CLI tool that integrates MCP for AI context, migrates Goss configurations, and runs structured assertions with schema validation.
concerns: Scattered test directories (.goralph/specs, ClaudeDesktop/specs) may indicate fragmented testing strategy
Heavy reliance on internal packages could limit extensibility
Migration logic (goss translator) might become a maintenance burden if source format evolves
suggestions: Consolidate test specifications into a single location
Document the MCP handler API surface
Consider adding integration tests that span multiple internal packages
Review goss translator for edge case coverage based on recent migration docs
